Command registry design.question: How should the command system be organized?
Command registry design.answer: Central typed registry — one CommandRegistry Map<string, Command> with {id, label, category, keybinding?, handler}. Single source of truth for palette and keymap.

Command registry design.question: Should keymap.ts be refactored to dispatch through the registry?
Command registry design.answer: Registry dispatch replaces keymap.ts. Single dispatch path. A3 chords migrated to registry entries.
options_presented: Dual path — grid keeps switch, palette uses registry

Command registry design.question: How should command handlers receive app context?
Command registry design.answer: Single AppContext object built once at App.tsx mount, threaded into registry. Handlers destructure what they need.

Command registry design.question: Where does the native OS menu fit?
Command registry design.answer: Auto-generate Tauri native menu items from registry entries at app init. Categories map to menu groups.
options_presented: Stub for A7, real wiring in A8
